name: SomeIpSDSetServiceStatus
title: SomeIpSDSetServiceStatus
syntax: long SomeIpSDSetServiceStatus( dword psiHandle, long up );
description: The status of the Provided Service Instance is set at the node (producer).

parameters.name: psiHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the required Consumed Service Instance (see SomeIpCreateProvidedServiceInstance).

parameters.name: up
parameters.description: 1: The status is changed to up. The sending of OfferServices is started. 0: The status is changed to down. A StopOfferService message is sent if the service was previously in up status.

return: Handle of the required Consumed Service
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
